# TS9703

**Category:** Import Resolution · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Ambiguous resolution: both '{source1}' and '{source2}' provide '{symbol}'
```

## Explanation

Multiple imports provide the same symbol, creating ambiguity.

Solutions:
1. Use explicit imports to disambiguate
2. Alias one of the imports: import { x as y } from "..."

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
